name: A. Rahman
bio: Leads the lab's test and DFT research, focusing on scalable ATPG and scan compression for very large designs.

name: S. Iyer
area: AI Hardware, EDA Automation, Machine Learning
bio: Works at the intersection of machine learning and design automation, from accelerator dataflows to learned physical-design models.

name: M. Okonkwo
bio: Researches disaggregated architectures and the testability of heterogeneous multi-die packages.

name: L. García
bio: Builds reproducible, low-power design methodologies on open process design kits.

name: N. Verma
bio: Investigates hardware trust and exploratory substrates including molecular storage.
